form.formComment: Second-up. First start ran last in a small field at Woodville on November 2 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Our Sniper with 57.5kg at $14.60. Returned from break 2nd in a small field at Tauherenikau on March 22 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Hayworth with 55.5kg at $16.80. Should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second-up. First start ran last in a small field at Woodville on November 2 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Our Sniper with 57.5kg at $14.60. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Commenced to race ungenerously for a distance passing the 1000m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 14 at Te Aroha November 11 over 1400m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Ploy carrying 57kg at $15.10. On debut third of 7 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw September 28 over 1400m, soft track; 2 len behind Our Grecia Girl carrying 57.5kg at $2.10. Everything points to a effective return.

Lay outwards when placed under pressure in the final straight.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, raced behind the speed prior to fading 9th of 14 at Pukekohe on February 25 over 1400m, slow going 3.5 len behind La Diem carrying 57kg at $82.80. Last start from last on the turn 4th of 8 at this track on March 18 over 1400m, 2 len behind Trafalgar carrying 54.5kg at $5.70. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.
